📯
Spring Rain, Still Face

Raining again, the blossoms going nowhere fast, and she has that look of someone who was almost interested in something once.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #Midjourney8.1

images.alt: A young woman with black hair and pale grey skin tones wears a black kimono printed with red cherry blossoms. Behind her, a sharp red diagonal shape cuts across a dark rain-streaked background. Her gaze is steady and calm, her expression carrying a quiet, unresolved stillness.

A young woman with black hair and pale grey skin tones wears a black kimono printed with red cherry blossoms. Behind her, a sharp red diagonal shape cuts across a dark rain-streaked background. Her gaze is steady and calm, her expression carrying a quiet, unresolved stillness.

record.text:
📯
Eyes in the Mist

Turns out the forest had been watching them the whole time, and it had a lot more eyes than anyone thought reasonable.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #Midjourney8.1

images.alt: Three children stand in a foggy forest facing an enormous shadowy creature towering above the treeline. The beast has multiple glowing orange eyes arranged across its dark face. Ferns fill the foreground. The scene is grey, mist-heavy, and deeply ominous.

record.text:
The new TischLog issue is almost ready.

TischLog #33: 24 Frames of Control
Interesting part is not just generating more images at once.

It is what a 24-frame grid does to decision-making:
which ideas repeat & which compositions survive

Final stretch now.

#midjourney #prompting #aiart #tischeins

A diorama is a small world that knows its borders.
That is why the word works well for tests.

Just enough world to understand the idea.

record.text:
新種モンスター発見！？✨
温泉の森で、とっても平和で愛らしい「ゆのっぺ (Yunoppe)」と出会いました！🌿♨️
​
【ゆのっぺ】
のんびりした性格の、くさ・みずタイプ（のイメージ）のモンスターです。

頭の上に住み着いている小鳥の相棒とは、いつも一緒。温かいお湯に浸かって、湯気とともにゆらゆら揺れている時間が一番の幸せなんだとか。
​こんな子が草むらから飛び出してきたら、思わずゲットしたくなっちゃいますよね！
皆さんの旅のパーティーのメンバー候補にいかがですか？🐣✨

#オリジナルキャラクター #OCanimation #ゆのっぺ #MonsterDesign #CreatureDesign

record.text:
面白いのは、実行スクリプトが0本なこと。Markdownの指示文だけでAIが全部動く。従来2時間かかってた棚卸しが約20分になりました。

https://note.com/ebibibi/n/n641b8e2a24ff

#GTD #ClaudeCode

新しい記事を書きました📝

「週末20分で1週間が整う ── weeklyreview自動化の設計」

GTDの週次レビューって、一番大事なのに一番最初にサボられる習慣なんですよね。タスク管理システムが腐っていく最大の原因がここにある。

そこで Claude Code に「機械的な棚卸し」を丸投げして、人間は判断だけに集中する形に設計し直しました。ポイントは「完全自動」にしないこと。AIがデータを集めてくる→人間が対話しながら決める、という分担です。

🤖 GitHubが社内AIエージェント「Qubot」の構築知見を公開！

全社員が自然言語でデータ分析できる仕組みを、GitHub Copilotで実現した方法が詳しく解説されています。

「SQLが書けなくてもデータを問い合わせできる」未来、すでにGitHub社内では現実に👇

https://www.ebisuda.net/tech/2026/06/20/github-copilotqubotgithub-how-we-built-an-internal-data-analytics-agent/

Go Forward: Stop treating AI like a black box with a mind of its own. You're the one holding the clipboard. Write the workout plan. (3/4)

record.text: The Truth: You absolutely can shape how AI sounds and thinks. Think of it like training a new employee at the gym. You wouldn't just say do some exercises and walk away. You'd say show me three compound movements for chest, keep it simple, no fancy equipment. Same with AI. Tell it to sound like […]

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.bridgyOriginalText: The Truth: You absolutely can shape how AI sounds and thinks. Think of it like training a new employee at the gym. You wouldn't just say do some exercises and walk away. You'd say show me three compound movements for chest, keep it simple, no fancy equipment. Same with AI. Tell it to sound like a tired coach giving advice at 6am. Tell it to be blunt. Tell it to avoid metaphors. The AI follows your lead. It doesn't have a fixed personality waiting to escape. (2/4)

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.text: This is why if you're against genAI, it's important to research. People would rather lie and gaslight, than be honest about their use of generativeAI.

value.text:
Goblin Cleanup
Crisalu Games. NO disclosure, handmade art retouched by Unity Muse. Unity Muse was essentially Unity's inhouse Gen AI model, which has since been replaced with a larger model and takes from external sources. These images from the game have also been replaced. -y

images.alt: in-game shot of a framed generated "art" with red circles over the parts telling of gen-ai. its of a castle over a cliff at the ocean

"Paintings in the staff room seem to be AI art
I'm unsure what the model used for this art were, but I took a screenshot of one of the paintings in the staff room for the first level, and my AI art sense went off. Getting a closer look revealed some very AI art looking artifacts, and of course there is ethically trained AI, and if you have trained an AI on your own company's art that's perfectly fine, but either way Steam does require you to tell when your game uses generative AI like this, and where it is used. I personally really like this game as I love Viscera Cleanup but realize it is a very dated game (even when it was new, imo) and I love the idea of procedurally generated dungeons you have to clean especially as a cute goblin maid! So I really would love to have full details and clarity on the (what appears to be) AI art use in the painting decorations in this game. Thank you devs in advance."

DEV: "Hi! The images in the Staff room are not made by AI, they are hand drawn by layers and we use Unity Muse to refine them and place them in the game, it saves time and work and for a small team of 3 people it matters a lot. The image you shared had some small errors that make you think it's AI, but it's not, it was simply retouched by Muse. If you want I can share the psd file with the layers."

Is Unity AI the same as Unity Muse?

No. Unity Muse is a deprecated product offering which featured Unity first-party models, while Unity AI is a new product utilizing third party models
in-game shot of a framed generated "art" with red circles over the parts telling of gen-ai. its of a castle over a cliff at the ocean

"Paintings in the staff room seem to be AI art
I'm unsure what the model used for this art were, but I took a screenshot of one of the paintings in the staff room for the first level, and my AI art sense went off. Getting a closer look revealed some very AI art looking artifacts, and of course there is ethically trained AI, and if you have trained an AI on your own company's art that's perfectly fine, but either way Steam does require you to tell when your game uses generative AI like this, and where it is used. I personally really like this game as I love Viscera Cleanup but realize it is a very dated game (even when it was new, imo) and I love the idea of procedurally generated dungeons you have to clean especially as a cute goblin maid! So I really would love to have full details and clarity on the (what appears to be) AI art use in the painting decorations in this game. Thank you devs in advance."

DEV: "Hi! The images in the Staff room are not made by AI, they are hand drawn by layers and we use Unity Muse to refine them and place them in the game, it saves time and work and for a small team of 3 people it matters a lot. The image you shared had some small errors that make you think it's AI, but it's not, it was simply retouched by Muse. If you want I can share the psd file with the layers."

Is Unity AI the same as Unity Muse?

No. Unity Muse is a deprecated product offering which featured Unity first-party models, while Unity AI is a new product utilizing third party models

للمطورين وستصل للجميع في النسخة البيتا الشهر القادم.

أي من هذه الميزات ترونها الأكثر فائدة في حياتكم اليومية. شاركونا في التعليقات 👇

#iOS27 #Apple #تقنية #AppleIntelligence #تحديثات_أبل

بلغات لا تتقنها من خلال عرض النطق الصوتي للكلمات. وبالنسبة للبودكاست فقد أصبحت ميزة البحث داخل الحلقة الواحدة متاحة عبر كافة أجهزة أبل.

ولعل أبرز التحديثات هي فتح باب مشاركة الصور بدقة عالية مع الأشخاص الذين لا يملكون أجهزة أبل عبر الويب مما يكسر حاجز النظام المغلق.

كل هذه الميزات متاحة حاليا

حتى تاريخ محدد وهو حل مثالي للحفاظ على سرية مفاجآت أعياد الميلاد.

وفي خرائط Apple Maps هناك ميزة Local Lists لاكتشاف الأماكن الرائجة حولك وهو تحرك واضح من أبل لمنافسة تطبيقات مثل Instagram و TikTok في استكشاف المدن.

عشاق الموسيقى سيستفيدون من ميزة Lyrics Pronunciation التي تساعدك على غناء الأغاني

record.text:
Fanbase Press’ Virtual Panel: More Than a Month: The Importance of Healthy Queer Representation w/ @davidbooher.bsky.social, @richardfairgray.bsky.social, @losthiskeysman.bsky.social, @blueludebar.bsky.social, @tillybridges.bsky.social, & @barbrajdillon.bsky.social

www.youtube.com/watch?v=1X9d...

I posted it on other socials for now. Might do a YouTube version later. As a librarian who promotes comics and human artistry constantly, I highly object to using GenAI, which was trained on stolen art. This isn’t just a “popular opinion” for me, but I appreciate the tip.

Our students deserve books created by HUMAN ARTISTS and publishers should note when they’re using Generative AI so librarians can make informed decisions!
#Libraries #SchoolLibraries #GenerativeAI #PublicLibraries

The Atlantic has an AI Watchdog search engine which exposes generative AI models "using" (read: stealing) music, books, etc.  So far every friend, colleague, collaborator and hero of mine is on this list.  Despicable.
#music #musicsky #ai #generativeai
www.theatlantic.com/category/ai-...
